tool.name: mobsf_static_scan
tool.description: Upload an APK/IPA/AAB/XAPK to MobSF and run static analysis. Returns compact summary: app_name, security_score, findings by severity, dangerous permissions, trackers, secrets, domains, URLs. MobSF must be running at mobsf_url. Set MOBSF_API_KEY env var.

parameter.name: api_key
parameter.description: If empty, reads MOBSF_API_KEY env var.

tool.name: mobsf_report
tool.description: Fetch full / section of MobSF report JSON by hash. section: full / code_analysis / permissions / urls / secrets.
